message: You are looking for information in Cambridge
You are looking for a train. The train should arrive by 20:45 and should go to norwich
The train should depart from cambridge and should leave on tuesday
Once you find the train you want to make a booking for 5 people
Make sure you get the reference number
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should have a star of 4 and should be in the expensive price range
The hotel should include free wifi and should be in the type of guesthouse
If there is no such hotel, how about one that is in the cheap price range
Once you find the hotel you want to book it for the same group of people and 3 nights starting from saturday
Make sure you get the reference number
